_comment: QuizCraft MCP Server — drop this block into your Claude Desktop or Claude Code MCP config.
_prerequisites: Option A (Ollama): ollama pull qwen3:4b && ollama serve
Option B (OpenAI-compatible): set LLM_BACKEND=openai + OPENAI_API_BASE + OPENAI_API_KEY + OPENAI_MODEL

quizcraft.description: AI-powered quiz generator — generate quizzes from any topic using Ollama, LM Studio, Groq, OpenRouter, or any OpenAI-compatible LLM.
